What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: Three girls wearing pink and purple shirts sit around a board game scattered with money and cards. A person in a Santa Claus suit joins the group at the table. In a living room, colorful balloons and streamers decorate the space. Girls jump and hold balloons while the Santa figure sits on the floor. Pillows with owl graphics rest on a grey sofa nearby.
